Identity._comment: URL of the Enki Identity host — must match the issuer claim OpenIddict emits (request scheme + host). Trailing slash matches the dev setting.

Licensing._comment: Heimdall RSA private key for .lic signing. ProductionOnly in the validator but the generator throws at first use if the file is missing — keep the file outside the publish output and the IIS app pool identity needs read access. Pbkdf2Iterations matches dev for compatibility.
